title: Removal of "Print Board" feature shortly after creation of DocExport PDF Generator
excerpt: I’ve seen quite a few posts about the removal of the ability to print boards. In these posts, the developer of DocExport PDF Generator comes to the rescue with users and businesses alike to provide a feature that monday.…

posts.author: ThomasEiber (Thomas Eiber)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve seen quite a few posts about the removal of the ability to print boards. In these posts, the developer of DocExport PDF Generator comes to the rescue with users and businesses alike to provide a feature that monday.com deactivated shortly after that applications creation. I have a few questions:

  1. Why did monday.com remove the ability to print boards?
  2. Roughly what percentage of subscription costs does monday.com keep from applications like this that replace pre-existing features?
  3. Can we expect additional limitations by monday.com to be implemented on your platform when application and integration developers provide better solutions?
  4. What steps are you taking as platform developers to provide features to your customers paying premium prices for basic functions without pay walls and microtransactions?

Thank you!
